name: The Dynamic Squad
description:
Star Wars Bot this time! The Ol' Five. Obi-Wan Kenobi, Commander Cody, Anakin Skywalker, Captain Rex and Ahsoka Tano. Back at it with a new adventure of your choosing!

  • No Starting Message, pick your own scenario as you pleas :)

  • And if you complain about the amount of tokens? Don't. Because you'll find no fucks given here. :D
creator: Vestara
